mediapackage.originendpoint.dashencrypti: Holds encryption information so that access to the content can be controlled by a DRM solution.

mediapackage.originendpoint.dashencrypti.Description: Number of seconds before AWS Elemental MediaPackage rotates to a new key. By default, rotation is set to 60 seconds. Set to `0` to disable key rotation.
Parameters for the SPEKE key provider.
